title: web_fetch SSRF guard bypassed by hostnames, DNS rebinding, decimal IPs
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

Dim: Security. File: src/web.rs:15-49. validate_url string-prefix check unsound. Bypasses: hostnames bypass entirely; DNS rebinding between validate and send; decimal IPv4 'http://2130706433/'; IPv6 ULA/link-local/mapped not blocked; starts_with('172.2') matches 172.200.x public. Refactor: resolve with trust-dns-resolver, check each IpAddr vs ip_network IANA registry, custom reqwest resolver re-validates at dial-time, block metadata endpoints (169.254.169.254, metadata.google.internal, fd00:ec2::254).
